projectDescription: A browser extension that converts LaTeX-style equations to Notion's native math blocks.
keyFeatures: Automatic detection of inline ($...$) and block ($$...$$) LaTeX equations
One-click conversion with Ctrl+Alt+M keyboard shortcut
Browser extension popup for manual triggering
Sequential processing with DOM rescanning for dynamic content
publicApiSurface: convertMathEquations() - Main conversion function triggered by keyboard shortcut or popup
Ctrl+Alt+M - Keyboard shortcut for converting all equations on the page
Content script message listener for 'convert' action
